TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_miyamay, title = miyamay, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/miyamay} }

S.FORM: alang miyamay ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Ci'an go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 2,924 buwan, 7,823 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 13% kyan ku 1,023 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 87% kyan ku 6,800 hi nya. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na miyamay hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na miyamay hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na miyamay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na miyamay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na miyamay hya' ga Sirakesay. tay 'llaw na miyamay hya' ga Buner. tay 'zil na miyamay hya' ga Ciyibangcalay.

alang miyamay ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Ci'an go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 2,924 buwan, 7,823 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 13% kyan ku 1,023 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 87% kyan ku 6,800 hi nya. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na miyamay hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na miyamay hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na miyamay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na miyamay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na miyamay hya' ga Sirakesay. tay 'llaw na miyamay hya' ga Buner. tay 'zil na miyamay hya' ga Ciyibangcalay.
S.PHON: alaŋ mijamaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu ʦ~ʨiʔan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *,*** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi nja. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na mijamaj ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na mijamaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na mijamaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na mijamaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na mijamaj ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕirakes~ɕaj. taj ʔllaw na mijamaj ħjaʔ ɣa βuner. taj ʔzil na mijamaj ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨijiβaŋʦ~ʨalaj.
